violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2025

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs, beef) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (beer) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2025
Mambo sauce dated 1/4 was observed exceeding 7 days. PIC disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2025

At the time of inspection, ROP tuna was thawing with package intact. Reduced oxygen packaging fish that bears a label indicating that it is to be kept frozen until time of use shall be removed from the reduced oxygen environment. Temperature was observed to be over 38 degrees Fahrenheit, PIC voluntarily disposed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen and dining area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings in kitchen. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. PIC informed to increase pest control services. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2025

At time of inspection, establishment was lacking a 3-bay sink. Inspector observed dishwasher and rinse sink. A sink with at least 3 compartments shall be provided for manually washing, rinsing, and SANITIZING EQUIPMENT and UTENSILS. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the dishwasher has an accumulation of rodent droppings. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025
Missing floor tiles were observed in the kitchen and bar area. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights in the kitchen area. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025
